# midi

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: MIDI file input source for Sonata. Dropzone accepts .mid/.midi files; compile() parses them into a Score via @tonejs/midi.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Source` "MIDI File"
  - Exports: Values: `compile`, `MIDI_SOURCE_ID`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
